name: 5dim_enemies
title: 5Dim's mod - Enemies
author: 5Dim
description:
Enemies module for 5Dim's mod
Increases game difficulty with new enemy types. Recommended for experienced players!
This mod includes:
- New biter variants (stronger and faster)
- New spitter variants (more damage and range)
- New spawner types
- Experimental enemies (huge and powerful boss-like creatures)
Warning: This mod significantly increases game difficulty!
